title: Orlando Heat Wave
lead: Orlando is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.49. The city's temperature has reached extreme levels, posing a threat to residents and infrastructure.
body:
The current heat wave in Orlando has a Score of 10.0/10, indicating a severe and potentially life-threatening situation. 
 The city's weather conditions are characterized by high temperatures, with a CDD of 14.7 GG, and relatively low humidity, at 43%. 
 The wind speed is moderate, at 13.5 km/h, but it does not provide significant relief from the heat.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the impact of the heat wave immediately.
